title: Integration with Airbnb
excerpt: Integrate with Airbnb to ingest and update booking data for guest reservations, including reservation number, internal property name set by host, guest name, dates of stay, contact information, and payment information. A…

posts.author: traveltroubadour (Trevor Crombie)
posts.cookedHtml: Integrate with Airbnb to ingest and update booking data for guest reservations, including reservation number, internal property name set by host, guest name, dates of stay, contact information, and payment information. Allow for email automation to stay-specific email addresses provided by Airbnb.

posts.author: HebertDaigleProp (Philip Hebert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am highly interested in understanding how to fully benefit of any possible integration from Airbnb to Monday.com. I have 3 cottages that I would like to fully manage on Monday.com.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @HebertDaigleProp - you would need to utilize software like Zapier to handle this. Zapier has connectivity to both monday and Airbnb. Normally we would recommend make.com however Airbnb is not supported.

Thanks
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: MagdalenaBachinger (Magdalena Bachinger)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are currently considering building an Airbnb plugin for Monday. We would be very interested in learning about the specific challenges you are facing in your workflows so that we can find a solution.

Please reach out to magdalena.bachinger@cdtm.de. I’d be happy to schedule a quick call with you.
